body_txt: In works with traditional gender roles, the male protagonist is usually the sharpest pencil in the box, while his female Love Interest is depicted as more innocent , emotional or/and empathetic at best, or as a Brainless Beauty at worst. In more modern works , however, there's a tendency to subvert this , depicting the female as the smarter one. The female Love Interest would often behave in a smug way and tease her lover , and in a detective story, she would be prone to keeping her conclusions secret from him until the end, treating him the same way as Holmes treated Watson. In most cases, the male character in question isn't exactly dumb; quite the opposite, he often revels in his intellectual superiority and considers himself the smartest person in the room—that is, until he meets his match . At other times, he may be a Ditzy Genius or just extremely impulsive , preventing him from noticing some things around him. Often overlaps with Women Are Wiser and Trickster Girlfriend ; compare Mars and Venus Gender Contrast , when men and women are the complete opposites, Amazon Chaser , for someone who has a thing for physically superior women, and Sage Love Interest , for someone who provides wise and spiritual advices to their love interest. See also Men Are Childish , Bumbling Dad , Foolish Husband, Responsible Wife , Henpecked Husband and Parenting the Husband . Also compare Endearingly Dorky , Pair the Smart Ones , Birds of a Feather , Geeky Turn-On and Give Geeks a Chance , which may help explain why a smart guy has a smart er girlfriend. Contrast Men Are Better Than Women and Stay in the Kitchen . Slight overlap with Power Dynamics Kink is also possible.
